query:
SELECT 
  DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(created_at/1000)) as date,
  description,
  COUNT(*) as call_count,
  SUM(ABS(amount)) as total_points_spent
FROM points_transactions
WHERE type = 'spend'
  AND description LIKE '%問卜%'
GROUP BY DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(created_at/1000)), description
ORDER BY date DESC, call_count DESC;
